mapper.sql: SELECT ID, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, PORT_CODE, SHIP_NAME, CARGO_NAME, LOAD_OR_UNLOAD, TON, SHIP_STATUS, BERTH_TIME, LEAVE_TIME, BERTH_NAME, SCHEDULE FROM S_SHIP_TRENDS
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO S_SHIP_TRENDS(ID, PORT_CODE, SHIP_NAME, CARGO_NAME, LOAD_OR_UNLOAD, TON, SHIP_STATUS, BERTH_TIME, LEAVE_TIME, BERTH_NAME, SCHEDULE, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME) VALUES (#{portCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loadOrUnload, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ton, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipStatus, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{berthTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leaveTime, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{berthName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{schedule, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now})
mapper.update:
UPDATE S_SHIP_TRENDS
PORT_CODE = #{portCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SHIP_NAME = #{shipName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_NAME = #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LOAD_OR_UNLOAD = #{loadOrUnload,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TON = #{ton,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SHIP_STATUS = #{shipStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BERTH_TIME = #{berthTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LEAVE_TIME = #{leaveTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BERTH_NAME = #{berthName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SCHEDULE = #{schedule,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}

begin
UPDATE S_SHIP_TRENDS SET
PORT_CODE = #{portCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SHIP_NAME = #{shipName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CARGO_NAME = #{cargoName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LOAD_OR_UNLOAD = #{loadOrUnload,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TON = #{ton,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SHIP_STATUS = #{shipStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BERTH_TIME = #{berthTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LEAVE_TIME = #{leaveTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BERTH_NAME = #{berthName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SCHEDULE = #{schedule,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id};
end;
